hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】以下是美联储主席提名人凯文·沃什周二在参议院听证会上的预期内容；【CRYPTO】研究人员因对基础技术的“最大量子攻击”而赢得 1 比特币赏金；【CRYPTO】美国政府因持有英特尔股份而获得 265 亿美元收益，股价飙升 22%。

items.title: Here's what to expect from Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh's Senate hearing Tuesday
items.summary: In a much-anticipated hearing before the Banking Committee, the former Fed governor will face questioning over a variety of subjects
items.title_zh: 以下是美联储主席提名人凯文·沃什周二在参议院听证会上的预期内容
items.summary_zh: 在银行委员会备受期待的听证会上，前美联储理事将面临各种问题的质询

items.title: Researcher wins 1 bitcoin bounty for 'largest quantum attack' on underlying tech
items.summary: Independent researcher Giancarlo Lelli broke a 15-bit elliptic curve key on publicly accessible quantum hardware, 512 times larger than the previous public demonstration in September 2025.
items.title_zh: 研究人员因对基础技术的“最大量子攻击”而赢得 1 比特币赏金
items.summary_zh: 独立研究员 Giancarlo Lelli 在可公开访问的量子硬件上打破了 15 位椭圆曲线密钥，比 2025 年 9 月的上次公开演示大了 512 倍。

items.title: U.S. government sits on $26.5 billion gain from Intel stake, as shares surge 22%
items.summary: The surge in Intel shares, up more than 22% after earnings, has significantly boosted the value of the U.S. government’s position.
items.title_zh: 美国政府因持有英特尔股份而获得 265 亿美元收益，股价飙升 22%
items.summary_zh: 英特尔股价飙升，财报公布后股价上涨超过 22%，显着提升了美国政府的地位。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. Blockade Will Last ‘as Long as It Takes,’ Hegseth Says
items.summary: Iran has made lifting the blockade of its ports a condition of resuming talks to end the war. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said that U.S. forces had stopped 34 vessels since President Trump imposed the order.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：赫格塞斯表示，美国的封锁将持续“多久”
items.summary_zh: 伊朗已将解除对其港口的封锁作为恢复结束战争谈判的条件。国防部长皮特·赫格斯表示，自特朗普总统下达该命令以来，美军已拦截了 34 艘船只。

items.title: Spot bitcoin ETFs draw $2 billion in net inflows over 8-day positive streak
items.summary: Spot bitcoin ETFs logged $223.2 million in net inflows on Thursday, led by $167.5 million into BlackRock's IBIT.
items.title_zh: 现货比特币 ETF 连续 8 天净流入 20 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 周四，现货比特币 ETF 净流入 2.232 亿美元，其中贝莱德 IBIT 流入 1.675 亿美元。

items.title: Jacob Andreas and Brett McGuire named Edgerton Award winners
items.summary: The associate professors of EECS and chemistry, respectively, are honored for exceptional contributions to teaching, research, and service at MIT.
items.title_zh: 雅各布·安德烈亚斯和布雷特·麦奎尔被评为埃哲顿奖获得者
items.summary_zh: EECS 和化学副教授分别因对麻省理工学院的教学、研究和服务做出的杰出贡献而受到表彰。

items.title: Human-machine teaming dives underwater
items.summary: Researchers are developing hardware and algorithms to improve collaboration between divers and autonomous underwater vehicles engaged in maritime missions.
items.title_zh: 人机协作潜入水下
items.summary_zh: 研究人员正在开发硬件和算法，以改善潜水员和执行海上任务的自主水下航行器之间的协作。

items.title: Helping data centers deliver higher performance with less hardware
items.summary: Researchers developed a system that intelligently balances workloads to improve the efficiency of flash storage hardware in a data center.
items.title_zh: 帮助数据中心以更少的硬件提供更高的性能
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发了一种智能平衡工作负载的系统，以提高数据中心闪存存储硬件的效率。

items.title: The aerospace and defense trade is taking investors deeper into space, and more ETFs are up for the mission
items.summary: VettaFi's Cinthia Murphy finds more exchange-traded funds are tackling the space theme more directly as excitement over the SpaceX IPO grows.
items.title_zh: 航空航天和国防贸易正在将投资者带入更深入的太空，更多的 ETF 正准备迎接这一使命
items.summary_zh: VettaFi 的辛西娅·墨菲 (Cinthia Murphy) 发现，随着 SpaceX 首次公开募股 (IPO) 的热情日益高涨，越来越多的交易所交易基金正在更直接地探讨太空主题。

items.title: NYC Mayor Mamdani knocked Ken Griffin in pied-a-terre tax promo. His firm calls the move 'shameful'
items.summary: Chief Operating Officer Gerald Beeson saying in a memo that targeting Griffin showed "ignorance and disdain" toward contributors to the city's economy.
items.title_zh: 纽约市市长马姆达尼在临时税收促销活动中击败了肯·格里芬。他的公司称此举“可耻”
items.summary_zh: 首席运营官杰拉尔德·比森(Gerald Beeson)在一份备忘录中表示，针对格里芬表现出对该市经济贡献者的“无知和蔑视”。

items.title: Traders are betting on big moves in Intel on earnings
items.summary: Semiconductor stocks are powering the U.S. equity market to records and traders are predicting that means a big swing in shares of Intel after earnings tonight.
items.title_zh: 交易员押注英特尔盈利的重大变动
items.summary_zh: 半导体股正在推动美国股市创下历史新高，交易员预测这意味着今晚公布财报后英特尔股价将出现大幅波动。

items.title: Kalshi traders don't see Strait of Hormuz traffic returning to normal until July
items.summary: Chances that traffic returns to normal fell below 50% on Wednesday, according to Kalshi bettors, despite the U.S. and Iran extending the ceasefire.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希贸易商预计霍尔木兹海峡交通要到七月才能恢复正常
items.summary_zh: 据 Kalshi 投注者称，尽管美国和伊朗延长了停火期限，但周三交通恢复正常的可能性仍低于 50%。

items.title: Bessent says 'many' U.S. allies have asked for currency swaps amid Iran war turbulence
items.summary: The White House on Tuesday said the UAE had not requested a currency swap line.
items.title_zh: 贝森特表示，在伊朗战争动荡期间，“许多”美国盟友已要求进行货币互换
items.summary_zh: 白宫周二表示，阿联酋没有要求货币互换额度。

items.title: Trump administration discussing currency swap line with United Arab Emirates
items.summary: Such a move would provide liquidity in dollars to the oil-rich UAE, but could be politically tenuous for the administration amid higher prices at home.
items.title_zh: 特朗普政府与阿拉伯联合酋长国讨论货币互换额度
items.summary_zh: 此举将为石油资源丰富的阿联酋提供美元流动性，但由于国内油价上涨，对政府来说可能在政治上脆弱。

items.title: Nato says 'no provision' to expel members after report US could seek to suspend Spain
items.summary: An internal Pentagon email reportedly outlines options to punish allies over a perceived lack of support for Iran war.
items.title_zh: 北约称美国可能寻求暂停西班牙成员国资格后“没有规定”驱逐成员国
items.summary_zh: 据报道，五角大楼的一封内部电子邮件概述了因盟友缺乏对伊朗战争支持而惩罚盟友的选项。

items.title: No 10 says Falklands sovereignty rests with UK after report of US 'review'
items.summary: An internal Pentagon document reportedly raised the prospect of a change in position in retaliation for the UK not joining the Iran war.
items.title_zh: 美国“审查”报告后，第10号称福克兰群岛主权属于英国
items.summary_zh: 据报道，五角大楼的一份内部文件提出了改变立场的可能性，以报复英国不加入伊朗战争。

items.title: US justice department drops probe into Fed chairman Jerome Powell
items.summary: President Donald Trump had accused Powell of improper cost overruns in renovating the Fed's building.
items.title_zh: 美国司法部撤销对美联储主席杰罗姆·鲍威尔的调查
items.summary_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统指责鲍威尔在翻修美联储大楼时成本超支。

items.title: Key suspect in notorious Tadamon massacre during Syria civil war arrested
items.summary: Amjad Youssef was wanted over the mass killing of blindfolded civilians in April 2013 in the district of Damascus.
items.title_zh: 叙利亚内战期间臭名昭著的塔达蒙大屠杀的主要嫌疑人被捕
items.summary_zh: 阿姆贾德·优素福 (Amjad Youssef) 因 2013 年 4 月在大马士革地区大规模屠杀蒙眼平民而受到通缉。

items.title: $106 Billion Loan Reflects E.U.’s View That Peace in Ukraine Is Far Away
items.summary: Unlike previous European assistance packages, this one is heavily weighted toward military spending, meant to put Ukraine on solid footing for a long fight.
items.title_zh: 1060亿美元贷款反映出欧盟认为乌克兰的和平还很遥远
items.summary_zh: 与之前的欧洲援助计划不同，这一计划的重点是军事支出，旨在为乌克兰奠定长期战斗的基础。

items.title: Afghans Who Helped U.S. Forces Say They’re Being Pushed Back to the Taliban
items.summary: Once promised a move to the United States, Afghan refugees who helped U.S. forces say they face ‘bad or worse’ options: resettlement to Congo or returning home to live under the Taliban.
items.title_zh: 帮助美军的阿富汗人称他们被推回塔利班
items.summary_zh: 一旦承诺移居美国，帮助美军的阿富汗难民表示，他们面临“糟糕或更糟糕”的选择：重新安置到刚果或返回家园在塔利班统治下生活。

items.title: Journalist Detained in Kuwait After Posting About Iran War Is Acquitted
items.summary: Ahmed Shihab-Eldin, a Kuwaiti-American journalist, is expected to be released soon, after 52 days in detention, a lawyer for two of his family members said.
items.title_zh: 发表有关伊朗战争的文章后在科威特被拘留的记者被无罪释放
items.summary_zh: 科威特裔美国记者艾哈迈德·希哈卜·埃尔丁 (Ahmed Shihab-Eldin) 两名家人的律师表示，他在被拘留 52 天后预计很快就会获释。

items.title: Fluent launches Ethereum Layer 2 mainnet and BLEND token with $50 million day-one liquidity
items.summary: Fluent launched its Ethereum Layer 2 mainnet alongside its BLEND token and a native stablecoin with $50 million in day-one liquidity.
items.title_zh: Fluent 推出以太坊 Layer 2 主网和 BLEND 代币，第一天流动性达 5000 万美元
items.summary_zh: Fluent 推出了以太坊第 2 层主网以及 BLEND 代币和第一天流动性为 5000 万美元的原生稳定币。

items.title: Researcher breaks 15-bit elliptic curve key in ‘largest quantum attack,’ wins 1 bitcoin bounty from Project Eleven
items.summary: Independent researcher Giancarlo Lelli derived a 15-bit elliptic curve key on a publicly accessible quantum computer, Project Eleven said.
items.title_zh: 研究人员在“最大的量子攻击”中破解了 15 位椭圆曲线密钥，赢得了 Project 11 的 1 比特币赏金
items.summary_zh: Project Eleven 表示，独立研究员 Giancarlo Lelli 在一台可公开访问的量子计算机上导出了 15 位椭圆曲线密钥。

items.title: GOP pressed Commerce Sec. Lutnick after crypto PAC’s planned Texas move alarmed party leaders: Axios
items.summary: GOP leaders called Howard Lutnick after a crypto super PAC seeded by his former firm planned to buy ads in a heated Texas race, per Axios.
items.title_zh: 共和党向商务部施压。加密货币 PAC 计划在德克萨斯州采取行动后，Lutnick 震惊了政党领导人：Axios
items.summary_zh: 据 Axios 报道，霍华德·卢特尼克 (Howard Lutnick) 的前公司发起的加密货币超级政治行动委员会计划在德克萨斯州激烈的竞选中购买广告，之后共和党领导人致电霍华德·卢特尼克 (Howard Lutnick)。

items.title: Mantle proposes up to 30,000 ETH loan to address Aave bad debt from Kelp exploit
items.summary: The Mantle team wrote that the loan would generate yield and strengthen the relationship between Mantle and Aave.
items.title_zh: Mantle 提议提供高达 30,000 ETH 的贷款，以解决因 Kelp 漏洞而造成的 Aave 坏账问题
items.summary_zh: Mantle 团队写道，这笔贷款将产生收益并加强 Mantle 和 Aave 之间的关系。

items.title: Introducing GPT-5.5
items.summary: Introducing GPT-5.5, our smartest model yet—faster, more capable, and built for complex tasks like coding, research, and data analysis across tools.
items.title_zh: GPT-5.5 简介
items.summary_zh: 隆重推出 GPT-5.5，这是我们迄今为止最智能的模型，速度更快、功能更强大，专为跨工具编码、研究和数据分析等复杂任务而构建。

items.title: GPT-5.5 Bio Bug Bounty
items.summary: Explore the GPT-5.5 Bio Bug Bounty: a red-teaming challenge to find universal jailbreaks for bio safety risks, with rewards up to $25,000.
items.title_zh: GPT-5.5 生物错误赏金
items.summary_zh: 探索 GPT-5.5 生物错误赏金：一项红队挑战，旨在寻找生物安全风险的通用越狱方法，奖励高达 25,000 美元。

items.title: 3 new ways Ads Advisor is making Google Ads safer and faster
items.summary: Three new agentic safety and policy features integrated into Ads Advisor will help protect and streamline your Google Ads account.
items.title_zh: Ads Advisor 让 Google Ads 更安全、更快速的 3 种新方法
items.summary_zh: Ads Advisor 中集成的三项新的代理安全和政策功能将有助于保护和简化您的 Google Ads 帐户。

items.title: New ways to create personalized images in the Gemini app
items.summary: Nano Banana 2 now uses your personal context and Google Photos to create images that reflect your unique life.
items.title_zh: 在 Gemini 应用程序中创建个性化图像的新方法
items.summary_zh: Nano Banana 2 现在使用您的个人背景和 Google Photos 来创建反映您独特生活的图像。

items.title: Bringing AI-driven protein-design tools to biologists everywhere
items.summary: Founded by Tristan Bepler PhD ’20 and former MIT professor Tim Lu PhD ’07, OpenProtein.AI offers researchers open-source models and other tools for protein engineering.
items.title_zh: 为世界各地的生物学家带来人工智能驱动的蛋白质设计工具
items.summary_zh: OpenProtein.AI 由 Tristan Bepler 博士 '20 和前麻省理工学院教授 Tim Lu 博士 '07 创立，为研究人员提供开源模型和其他蛋白质工程工具。

items.title: New technique makes AI models leaner and faster while they’re still learning
items.summary: Researchers use control theory to shed unnecessary complexity from AI models during training, cutting compute costs without sacrificing performance.
items.title_zh: 新技术使人工智能模型在学习过程中变得更精简、更快
items.summary_zh: 研究人员利用控制理论在训练过程中消除人工智能模型不必要的复杂性，在不牺牲性能的情况下降低计算成本。

items.title: Bitmine to buy 10,000 ether for $23.9 million from the Ethereum Foundation
items.summary: The transaction brings the firm’s holdings closer to its 5% of ETH target.
items.title_zh: Bitmine 将以 2390 万美元从以太坊基金会购买 10,000 个以太币
items.summary_zh: 此次交易使该公司的持有量更接近 5% 的 ETH 目标。

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Aptos (APT) gains 3.5%, leading index higher
items.summary: Aave (AAVE), up 3.2% from Thursday, was also a top performer.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 20 业绩更新：Aptos (APT) 上涨 3.5%，领先指数走高
items.summary_zh: Aave (AAVE) 较周四上涨 3.2%，也是表现最好的股票。

items.title: Bitcoin, dollar move in near-perfect opposition. It hasn't been this extreme in almost 4 years.
items.summary: What you need to know for April 24, 2026
items.title_zh: 比特币和美元的走势几乎完全相反。近四年来，还没有出现过如此极端的情况。
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 4 月 24 日您需要了解的信息

items.title: Bitcoin stalls below at $77,500 as volatility cools, traders unwind leverage
items.summary: BTC holds a tight range as open interest drops, signaling cooling momentum, while altcoins show mixed performance and ZEC attracts fresh bullish interest.
items.title_zh: 随着波动性降温，交易员解除杠杆，比特币跌破 77,500 美元
items.summary_zh: 随着未平仓合约下降，BTC 保持窄幅波动，表明势头降温，而山寨币表现不一，ZEC 吸引了新的看涨兴趣。

items.title: Michael Saylor says the bitcoin winter is over. Some experts agree, with caveats.
items.summary: Market analyst Mati Greenspan said bitcoin has not gone through a “winter,” rather a pullback within a broader bull market, adding the next leg up for bitcoin will be driven by nation-state adoption.
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·塞勒 (Michael Saylor) 表示，比特币的冬天已经结束。一些专家对此表示同意，但也提出了一些警告。
items.summary_zh: 市场分析师马蒂·格林斯潘表示，比特币并没有经历“冬天”，而是更广泛的牛市中的回调，并补充说比特币的下一个上涨将由民族国家的采用推动。

items.title: Bitcoin-holder Metaplanet raises $50 million to buy more BTC
items.summary: Metaplanet has issued 8 billion yen, or about $50 million, in zero-interest bonds to fund additional bitcoin purchases.
items.title_zh: 比特币持有者 Metaplanet 筹集 5000 万美元购买更多比特币
items.summary_zh: Metaplanet 已发行 80 亿日元（约合 5000 万美元）的零息债券，为额外购买比特币提供资金。

items.title: Ethereum Foundation sells nearly $24 million of ETH to Tom Lee’s Bitmine
items.summary: Bitmine Immersion also spent about $10 million when it bought 5,000 ETH from the Ethereum Foundation last month.
items.title_zh: 以太坊基金会向 Tom Lee 的 Bitmine 出售近 2400 万美元的 ETH
items.summary_zh: Bitmine Immersion 上个月还花费了约 1000 万美元从以太坊基金会购买了 5,000 个 ETH。

items.title: Morgan Stanley launches stablecoin reserves fund aligned with GENIUS Act requirements
items.summary: Morgan Stanley launched a government money market fund for stablecoin issuers to hold reserves in line with GENIUS Act requirements.
items.title_zh: 摩根士丹利推出符合 GENIUS 法案要求的稳定币储备基金
items.summary_zh: 摩根士丹利为稳定币发行人推出了政府货币市场基金，以根据《天才法案》的要求持有准备金。

items.title: Metaplanet issues $50 million in zero-interest bonds to buy more bitcoin
items.summary: In the first quarter of this year, Metaplanet purchased 5,075 BTC, bringing its total to 40,177 BTC as of March 31.
items.title_zh: Metaplanet 发行 5000 万美元零息债券以购买更多比特币
items.summary_zh: 今年第一季度，Metaplanet 购买了 5,075 BTC，截至 3 月 31 日，其总数达到 40,177 BTC。

items.title: Training and Finetuning Multimodal Embedding & Reranker Models with Sentence Transformers
items.title_zh: 使用句子变压器训练和微调多模态嵌入和重排序模型

items.title: We're launching two specialized TPUs for the agentic era.
items.summary: The eighth generation of Google’s TPU includes two specialized chips that will power the future of AI.
items.title_zh: 我们正在推出两款针对代理时代的专用 TPU。
items.summary_zh: 第八代谷歌 TPU 包括两个专用芯片，将为人工智能的未来提供动力。

items.title: A new way to explore the web with AI Mode in Chrome
items.summary: Today’s upgrades for AI Mode in Chrome transform how you interact with the web
items.title_zh: 通过 Chrome 中的 AI 模式探索网络的新方式
items.summary_zh: 今天 Chrome 中 AI 模式的升级改变了您与网络交互的方式

items.title: Teaching AI models to say “I’m not sure”
items.summary: A new training method improves the reliability of AI confidence estimates without sacrificing performance, addressing a root cause of hallucination in reasoning models.
items.title_zh: 教人工智能模型说“我不确定”
items.summary_zh: 一种新的训练方法在不牺牲性能的情况下提高了人工智能置信度估计的可靠性，解决了推理模型中产生幻觉的根本原因。

items.title: A philosophy of work
items.summary: As the NC Ethics of Technology Postdoctoral Fellow, Michal Masny is advancing dialogue, teaching, and research into the social and ethical dimensions of new computing technologies.
items.title_zh: 工作哲学
items.summary_zh: 作为北卡罗来纳州技术伦理学博士后研究员，Michal Masny 正在推进新计算技术的社会和伦理层面的对话、教学和研究。

items.title: Foreign car companies bet on technology to hang onto once-lucrative China auto market
items.summary: U.S., Korean and German automakers announced a rush of new, tech-enabled cars at the Beijing Auto Show as they battle a sales slump
items.title_zh: 外国汽车公司押注技术以保住曾经利润丰厚的中国汽车市场
items.summary_zh: 美国、韩国和德国汽车制造商在北京车展上宣布推出大量新型科技汽车，以应对销量下滑

items.title: Risky meme trading is back. A trading rule change may have lit the fuse
items.summary: A regulatory shift is expected to remove barriers to rapid-fire trading and help revive a meme-stock frenzy.
items.title_zh: 高风险的模因交易又回来了。交易规则的改变可能点燃了导火索
items.summary_zh: 监管的转变预计将消除快速交易的障碍，并有助于重振迷因股票的狂热。

items.title: Volkswagen announces voice AI in its Chinese cars from later this year
items.summary: Volkswagen revealed four cars, including the ID. UNYX 09, which the company said it co-developed with EV maker Xpeng in two years.
items.title_zh: 大众汽车宣布今年晚些时候将在其中国汽车中配备语音人工智能
items.summary_zh: 大众汽车发布了四款汽车，其中包括 ID. UNYX 09，该公司表示，该产品是与电动汽车制造商小鹏汽车在两年内共同开发的。

items.title: Behind Nigeria's murky coup plot - the money, the prayers and a Nollywood arrest
items.summary: What court papers and sources close to the investigation have told the BBC about the scope of the plan.
items.title_zh: 尼日利亚阴暗政变阴谋背后——金钱、祈祷和诺莱坞逮捕
items.summary_zh: 法庭文件和接近调查的消息人士向 BBC 透露了该计划的范围。

items.title: South Africa's top envoy to Ghana summoned over attacks on foreigners
items.summary: A Ghanaian national was confronted by South Africans in a viral clip and questioned about his immigration status.
items.title_zh: 南非驻加纳最高特使因袭击外国人被召见
items.summary_zh: 在一段疯传的视频中，一名加纳国民与南非人对峙，并询问他的移民身份。

items.title: Poisoning suspected in deaths of 18 wolves in Italian national park
items.summary: After the carcasses of 10 wolves were found last week, another eight have been found in recent days.
items.title_zh: 意大利国家公园18只狼疑似中毒死亡
items.summary_zh: 继上周发现了 10 具狼的尸体后，最近几天又发现了 8 具狼的尸体。

items.title: Israel's Benjamin Netanyahu treated for early-stage prostate cancer
items.summary: The Israeli prime minister says he is "in excellent physical condition" after having a malignant tumour removed.
items.title_zh: 以色列本杰明·内塔尼亚胡因早期前列腺癌接受治疗
items.summary_zh: 以色列总理表示，在切除恶性肿瘤后，他“身体状况良好”。

items.title: Epstein housed abuse victims in London flats, BBC reveals
items.summary: The revelations intensify concerns about repeated police decisions not to investigate 2015 trafficking claims.
items.title_zh: 英国广播公司透露，爱泼斯坦在伦敦公寓安置了虐待受害者
items.summary_zh: 这些揭露加剧了人们对警方一再决定不调查 2015 年人口贩运指控的担忧。

items.title: Kenyan leader sparks uproar after  mocking Nigerians' spoken English
items.summary: William Ruto says Kenyans speak "some of the best English in the world" while it is hard to understand Nigerians.
items.title_zh: 肯尼亚领导人嘲笑尼日利亚人的英语口语引发轩然大波
items.summary_zh: 威廉·鲁托说，肯尼亚人的英语是“世界上最好的”，而尼日利亚人却很难听懂。

items.title: Gaza Set to Hold First Local Election in Two Decades
items.summary: Hamas said it was not participating in the municipal elections in Deir al-Balah, set for this weekend. Residents said it was a long-awaited opportunity to address the city’s problems
items.title_zh: 加沙将举行二十年来的首次地方选举
items.summary_zh: 哈马斯表示，不会参加定于本周末举行的代尔巴拉赫市政选举。居民表示这是一个期待已久的解决城市问题的机会

items.title: Europeans Ask: What Would It Mean to Defend One Another Without NATO?
items.summary: European Union nations have a little-known obligation to protect one another. Experts caution it is no replacement for NATO.
items.title_zh: 欧洲人问：没有北约，相互保卫意味着什么？
items.summary_zh: 欧盟国家有一项鲜为人知的相互保护义务。专家警告说，它无法取代北约。

items.title: In Britain, 7 Unelected Lords Are Helping to Block an Assisted Dying Bill
items.summary: A small group in the House of Lords has proposed hundreds of amendments that are helping stymie a bill that was meant to legalize medically assisted death for the terminally ill.
items.title_zh: 在英国，七位未经选举产生的上议院正在帮助阻止协助死亡法案
items.summary_zh: 上议院的一个小团体提出了数百项修正案，这些修正案正在帮助阻碍一项旨在使绝症患者的医疗协助死亡合法化的法案。

items.title: ‘Didi vs. Modi’: A Test for the Hindu Right in India’s Bengali Heartland
items.summary: The party of Prime Minister Narendra Modi has been making gains in a state once beyond its grasp, but many decry an audit that removed nine million voters, many of them Muslim.
items.title_zh: “迪迪与莫迪”：印度孟加拉腹地对印度教右翼的考验
items.summary_zh: 总理纳伦德拉·莫迪 (Narendra Modi) 领导的政党一直在这个一度超出其掌控范围的国家取得进展，但许多人谴责一项剥夺 900 万选民（其中许多是穆斯林）的审计。

items.title: The Generals Who Are Now Running Iran
items.summary: The killing of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei ushered in a new form of collective leadership in the country, with more power for the Revolutionary Guards.
items.title_zh: 现在统治伊朗的将军们
items.summary_zh: 阿亚图拉阿里·哈梅内伊的遇害开启了该国新的集体领导形式，革命卫队获得了更多权力。

items.title: Touring Africa, Pope Leo Raised His Voice, but Didn’t Like the Echo
items.summary: On his recent trip abroad, Leo XIV made some of his most forthright comments since becoming pope last year, but grew uncomfortable at how that criticism was interpreted.
items.title_zh: 非洲之行，教皇利奥提高声音，但不喜欢回声
items.summary_zh: 在最近的出国访问中，利奥十四世发表了自去年成为教皇以来最直率的一些评论，但对这些批评的解释方式感到不安。

items.title: Jane Street asks court to reject Terraform claims tied to UST-LUNA crash
items.summary: A filing Thursday said the lawsuit rehashes events already settled in court and seeks damages for losses caused by internal misconduct.
items.title_zh: Jane Street 请求法院驳回与 UST-LUNA 坠机事件有关的 Terraform 索赔
items.summary_zh: 周四提交的一份文件称，该诉讼重述了法庭已经解决的事件，并要求赔偿因内部不当行为造成的损失。

items.title: India pushes e-rupee through welfare pilots as BRICS digital currency plan takes shape
items.summary: Farmers and food programs anchor 10 pilots aimed at boosting usage, while New Delhi eyes BRICS CBDC link ahead of 2026 summit
items.title_zh: 随着金砖国家数字货币计划成形，印度通过福利试点推动电子卢比
items.summary_zh: 农民和食品计划启动了 10 个试点项目，旨在提高使用率，而新德里则在 2026 年峰会之前关注金砖国家 CBDC 链接

items.title: DeFi Education Fund and other crypto leaders press SEC to lock in DeFi broker guidance
items.summary: The DeFi Education Fund and others are urging the SEC to formalize its recent decentralized finance interface guidance.
items.title_zh: DeFi 教育基金和其他加密货币领导者向 SEC 施压，要求锁定 DeFi 经纪人指导
items.summary_zh: DeFi 教育基金和其他机构正在敦促 SEC 正式确定其最近的去中心化金融接口指南。

items.title: Wisconsin sues Kalshi, Polymarket, Robinhood, Crypto.com and Coinbase over sports event contracts
items.summary: The Wisconsin DOJ sued Kalshi, Robinhood, Coinbase, Polymarket, and Crypto.com, alleging sports event contracts violate state gambling law.

items.summary_zh: 威斯康星州司法部起诉 Kalshi、Robinhood、Coinbase、Polymarket 和 Crypto.com，指控体育赛事合同违反该州赌博法。
